scripts.build: npm run story:build && tsc -b && vite build
scripts.story:build: node scripts/compile-story.mjs story/Crescent-Luna-en.story src/generated/story-en.json && node scripts/compile-story.mjs story/Crescent-Luna-ja.story src/generated/story-ja.json
scripts.story:check: node scripts/compile-story.mjs --check story/Crescent-Luna-en.story && node scripts/compile-story.mjs --check story/Crescent-Luna-ja.story
